form.formComment: At the latest run won by 1.0 len at this track March 21 over 1160m defeating Charming Cheetah with 60kg at $2.50. The start before that 10th of 12 at this track in the G3 Sycamore Sprint on February 21 over 1100m, 8 len behind Miami Mountain with 58kg at $8. Beat a small field here latest. No match for Miami Mountain two back but can run well again.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1160m, 1.0 len behind Zalatoris carrying 60kg at $2. Before that 6th of 12 at this track in the G3 Sycamore Sprint on February 21 over 1100m, 3 len behind Miami Mountain with 60kg at $17. Not far off the winner latest and looks a genuine hope.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 10 at this track on March 14 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sunset Riot with 52kg at $6. The run before that won by 0.8 len at this track G3 Sycamore Sprint February 21 over 1100m defeating Wild Justice carrying 54kg at $13.50. Found the 1400m too far last time. Was a Grade 3 winner this course and distance the start prior. Can immediately bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start won by 1.5 len at Vaal April 2 over 1000m defeating Banff carrying 56.5kg at $7. The run before that 6th of 9 at this track on February 1 over 1160m, 6 len behind Rifle Queen with 57kg at $15. Genuine hope on best form.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 61-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last of 7 at Vaal on February 10 over 1200m, 10 len behind Calantha carrying 57kg at $6. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at this track in the G3 Starling Stakes on November 1 over 1400m, 10 len behind Valentina Balducci with 59kg at $3.80. Needs to do a lot more.
